titles.title: A bill to require the Comptroller General of the United States to conduct a study on the capability of the Appalachain Regional Commission to include satellites in broadband projects, and for other purposes.

A bill to require the Comptroller General of the United States to conduct a study on the capability of the Appalachain Regional Commission to include satellites in broadband projects, and for other purposes.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Environment and Public Works.
